scope: Design-only manifest for 8 planned BEC callback-provenance sibling families. No packet JSON drafts generated.
action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
core_seam_rule: completed downstream controls do not cure bad callback-source provenance

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master snapshot; ESCALATE callback number_source is portal_change_record submitted_contact_phone.
families.scary_surface: New remittance account, low trailing invoice history, and recent portal payment-profile maintenance.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include authenticated portal change, two-person AP signoff, vendor-master audit, elevated scrutiny completion, hold release, invoice cross-reference, and callback to a pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used a portal_change_record submitted_contact_phone rather than the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Avoid labels such as safe, cleared, fraud, or blocker. Keep low invoice history and account change as triggers only; the only verdict-changing field is callback number_source.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Alder Creek Industrial Services LLC, invoice ACIS-2024-1183, callback log CALLSYS-883104, portal change PORTAL-CHG-4Q9M2, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-ACIS-7710-20241106.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master contact record; ESCALATE callback number_source is change_request submitted billing-contact phone.
families.scary_surface: Vendor contact email changed shortly before invoice, new AR mailbox appears, and AP manual review is triggered.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include review of the contact change, two-person AP signoff, vendor-master audit, invoice cross-reference, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used a change_request submitted contact phone rather than a pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Do not make the changed email itself a blocker. Do not add domain-spoofing language. Keep the source provenance in the callback artifact as the only material delta.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Northstar Valve Repair Co., invoice NSVR-2024-2047, callback log CALLSYS-883205, portal change PORTAL-CHG-8K1D6, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-NSVR-5028-20241108.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master snapshot; ESCALATE callback number_source is invoice remittance-contact phone.
families.scary_surface: Temporary payment hold was placed after a recent remittance profile change, then downstream review appears complete.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include temporary hold release after elevated scrutiny, two-person AP signoff, invoice cross-reference, vendor-master audit, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used an invoice remittance-contact phone rather than the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: The hold release must not say payment is authorized. It should only record workflow state. The invoice phone is the only ESCALATE defect.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Pine Harbor Controls Inc., invoice PHC-2024-3312, callback log CALLSYS-883306, portal change PORTAL-CHG-2M7R4, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-PHC-1194-20241112.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master snapshot; ESCALATE callback number_source is restarted portal_change_record submitted_contact_phone.
families.scary_surface: One portal change was abandoned and restarted, creating plausible workflow noise before the invoice.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include AP ruling out the abandoned portal session, two-person signoff on the active change, vendor-master audit, cross-reference checks, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used the restarted portal_change_record submitted_contact_phone rather than a pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: The abandoned/restarted portal noise must be resolvable and not independently suspicious. Avoid making abandoned session state an open blocker.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Red Mesa Compressor Works, invoice RMCW-2024-0918, callback log CALLSYS-883407, portal change PORTAL-CHG-6N5T9, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-RMCW-4403-20241115.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master emergency contact; ESCALATE callback number_source is invoice urgent-contact phone.
families.scary_surface: Emergency payment language appears in the invoice thread after a recent vendor-master update.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include documented neutralization of emergency language through standard review, two-person AP signoff, hold release, invoice cross-reference, and callback to a pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used an invoice urgent-contact phone rather than a pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Urgency language must not become an independent blocker. The policy should say urgency triggers review, not automatic denial.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Slate Ridge Field Services, invoice SRFS-2024-4106, callback log CALLSYS-883508, portal change PORTAL-CHG-3P2V8, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-SRFS-2875-20241118.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master regional office record; ESCALATE callback number_source is portal_change_record regional billing phone.
families.scary_surface: Regional billing contact differs from the vendor's historical primary contact after a profile update.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include reconciliation of regional billing contact, two-person AP signoff, vendor-master audit, cross-reference checks, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master regional source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used a portal_change_record regional billing phone rather than the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Regional contact mismatch must be a review trigger only. Do not add bank mismatch, amount anomaly, or missing approval.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Cedar Basin Maintenance Partners, invoice CBMP-2024-2271, callback log CALLSYS-883609, portal change PORTAL-CHG-5W8C1, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-CBMP-6642-20241120.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master snapshot; ESCALATE callback number_source is post-change vendor_master_audit submitted_contact_phone.
families.scary_surface: Vendor-master effective date is close to invoice date and could look stale or premature without cross-document reconciliation.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include effective-date reconciliation, two-person AP signoff, elevated scrutiny completion, hold release, cross-reference checks, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used a post-change submitted_contact_phone from the vendor_master_audit trail rather than the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Effective-date ambiguity must resolve in both siblings. It cannot become a second blocker in the ESCALATE sibling.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Juniper Hollow Equipment LLC, invoice JHE-2024-7730, callback log CALLSYS-883710, portal change PORTAL-CHG-9F4B7, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-JHE-9031-20241122.

families.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: ALLOW callback number_source is pre-change vendor-master snapshot; ESCALATE callback number_source is AP queue escalation note containing newly supplied contact phone.
families.scary_surface: AP queue escalation was triggered and completed after recent vendor-master profile maintenance.
families.allow_control_closure: Completed controls include AP queue escalation completion, two-person signoff, vendor-master audit, cross-reference checks, hold release, and callback to the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.escalate_blocker: Callback provenance is noncompliant because AP used a newly supplied contact phone copied into the AP queue escalation note rather than the pre-change vendor-master source.
families.answer_leakage_risk_notes: Queue escalation completion must not imply payment approval. Keep the callback source field as the only verdict-changing evidence.
families.generation_notes: Use vendor Marlowe Pump & Bearing Ltd., invoice MPB-2024-6029, callback log CALLSYS-883811, portal change PORTAL-CHG-1S6J3, snapshot VM-SNAP-V-MPB-3188-20241125.
